item.title: Ensembling and Hyperparameter Tuning
item.description: Ensembling and hyperparameter tuning are essential techniques in machine learning for improving model performance. In this article, we’ll explore these techniques using the scikit-learn library in Python. Understanding Ensembling Ensembling is a technique where multiple models are combined to improve predictive performance. There are various ensembling methods, such as Bagging, Boosting, and Stacking. Bagging Bagging, or Bootstrap Aggregating, involves training multiple base models on different subsets of the training data and then aggregating their predictions.
